NADP_trend_analysis

Bella Oleksy

2024-11-19

Some notes at the top about data processing

Interpolation method– - In the future we’ll want to (I think) mirror the method by Bret A. Schichtel et al. 2019 Sci Tot Env. Here, I am linearlly interpolated for periods of missing data with gaps no more than 2 weeks apart

Year vs. water year– Aggregating data on an annual basis instead of WY. Just flagging that in case we switch to WY later.

Missing data:

Data are missing throughout, unsurprisingly, but there are a few time periods that stick out, like 1986. I will exclude them for the initial trend analysis because they are biased low.
